scripts.build: mkdir -p dist; cd dist; rm -rf *;rm -rf .github; cd ..;node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p ./tsconfig.json; cp package*.json dist; cp README.md dist
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage:mongodb:server && npm run coverage:mongodb:node && npm run coverage:mongodb:web
scripts.coverage:mongodb:server: DEBUG=no nyc mocha src/setup-server.ts 'src/**/*.server.spec.ts' && nyc report --reporter=text-lcov > coverage-1.lcov
scripts.coverage:mongodb:node: DEBUG=no nyc mocha src/setup-node.ts 'src/**/*.node.spec.ts' && nyc report --reporter=text-lcov > coverage-2.lcov
scripts.coverage:mongodb:web: DEBUG=no nyc mocha src/setup-node.ts 'src/**/*.web.spec.ts' && nyc report --reporter=text-lcov > coverage-3.lcov
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:node && npm run test:web
